mapper.sql: book_project_id, pet_id, title, cover_title, cover_subtitle, dedication_text, template_code, cover_template_uid, content_template_uid, book_spec_code, book_spec_uid, sweetbook_book_id, book_uid, status, created_at, finalized_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_project ( pet_id, title, cover_title, cover_subtitle, dedication_text, template_code, cover_template_uid, content_template_uid, book_spec_code, book_spec_uid, sweetbook_book_id, book_uid, status ) VALUES ( #{petId}, #{title}, #{coverTitle}, #{coverSubtitle}, #{dedicationText}, #{templateCode}, #{coverTemplateUid}, #{contentTemplateUid}, #{bookSpecCode}, #{bookSpecUid}, #{sweetbookBookId}, #{bookUid}, #{status} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM book_project ORDER BY book_project_id DESC

SELECT
FROM book_project WHERE pet_id = #{petId} ORDER BY book_project_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE book_project SET title = #{title}, cover_title = #{coverTitle}, cover_subtitle = #{coverSubtitle}, dedication_text = #{dedicationText}, template_code = #{templateCode}, cover_template_uid = #{coverTemplateUid}, content_template_uid = #{contentTemplateUid}, book_spec_code = #{bookSpecCode}, book_spec_uid = #{bookSpecUid}, status = #{status} WHERE book_project_id = #{bookProjectId}
UPDATE book_project SET status = #{status}, finalized_at = NOW() WHERE book_project_id = #{bookProjectId}
